description.ko: 갈라진 사막의 토양, 이끼 낀 바위, 얼어붙은 빙하 능선 등 다양한 지구의 질감이 서로 어우러져 복잡한 행성 표면을 형성하는 고해상도 매크로 샷입니다.
description.en: A high-resolution macro shot of various Earth textures, including cracked desert soil, lush mossy rocks, and frozen glacial ridges, blending together to form a complex planetary surface.

prompt: A cinematic top-down satellite view of Earth's diverse textures, showcasing a hyper-realistic transition between cracked clay, emerald green forest floor, and crystalline blue ice patterns, 8k resolution, intricate details, organic patterns, TERRA-1 style.
